DEFENDANT ELDO GIACOMETTI'S RE-NOTICE OF DEFENDANT ELDO GIACOMETTIS MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTION OF COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PRAYER FOR JUDGMENT PAGE 13, LINE 27 (LOSS OF EARNINGS); PAGE 14, LINE 6 (ATTORNEY'S FEES); AND EXHIBIT A ARE STRICKEN. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. MOVING PARTY AND ITS COUNSEL IS ORDERED AGAIN (SEE CGC-12-522331 JANUARY 23, 2014 MINUTE ORDER) TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C IN FUTURE. THE PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: R. GOULDING; NOT REPORTED

Re-Notice Of Defendant Eldo Giacomettis Motion And Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No Appearances:
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ELDO GIACOMETTI's Re-Notice Of Defendant Eldo Giacomettis Motion To Strike Portion Of Complaint is GRANTED. Prayer for judgment page 13, line 27 (loss of earnings); page 14, line 6 (attorney's fees); and Exhibit A are stricken. No opposition filed. Defendant shall have 10 days to answer. Moving party and its counsel is ordered again (See CGC-12-522331 January 23, 2014 Minute Order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. The prevailing party to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
